briefdescription.para: Alias for Enums::PROCESS used throughout this class.
Internal command executor for queuing and running subprocesses.
Initialize Git repository in password store.
Pull changes from remote Git repository.
Push changes to remote Git repository.

parameterdescription.para: Path to password file relative to store root.

memberdef.argsstring: (const QString srcDir, const QString dest, const bool force=false)=0
memberdef.name: Move

memberdef.argsstring: (const QString srcDir, const QString dest, const bool force=false)=0
memberdef.name: Copy

briefdescription.para: Search password content for a pattern.
Generate GPG keys using batch script.
Check if GPG supports Ed25519 encryption.
Get default key template for new GPG keys.
Resolve the gpgconf command to kill agents.

simplesect.para: Resolved command with program and arguments.

briefdescription.para: Get .gpg-id file path for a password file.
Get list of recipients for a password file.

memberdef.argsstring: (PROCESS id, const QString &app, const QStringList &args, bool readStdout=true, bool readStderr=true)
memberdef.name: executeWrapper

briefdescription.para: Set or remove an environment variable.

parameterdescription.para: New value; empty string removes the variable.

memberdef.argsstring: (PROCESS id, const QString &app, const QStringList &args, QString input, bool readStdout=true, bool readStderr=true)
memberdef.name: executeWrapper

memberdef.argsstring: (int id, int exitCode, const QString &out, const QString &err)
memberdef.name: finished

memberdef.argsstring: (PROCESS pid, int exitCode, const QString &out, const QString &err)
memberdef.name: handleProcessError

briefdescription.para: Emitted when a process error occurs.
Emitted when GPG key generation finishes.
Emitted when grep finishes with matching results.

parameterdescription.para: List of (entry path, matching lines) pairs.

briefdescription.para: Abstract base class for password store operations.

detaileddescription.para:
Pass provides an abstraction layer for password management, supporting both the native 'pass' utility and gopass/imitation backends. It handles:
Password file operations (show, insert, remove, move, copy)
GPG key management and Git integration
OTP generation
Random password generation
Subclasses must implement Git and password operations.
